title: A novel hybrid CLARA and fuzzy time series Markov chain model for predicting air pollution in Jakarta
author: Sunusi, Sikib, et al.

steps.title: Method validation
steps.instruction: In forecasting sulfur dioxide and carbon monoxide air pollution in Jakarta using the hybrid CLARA and FTSMC, we utilized secondary data, specifically the daily air quality index from January 2021 to August 31, 2024. The dataset includes two dependent variables. The details of these variables are provided in Table 2.Table 2Variable description.Table 2VariableDescriptiony1Daily sulfur dioxide air pollution datay2Daily carbon monoxide air pollution data
